description: SP8192 + 3-layer recurrence + parallel residuals + legal score-first TTT + SWA + Hessian-ranked mixed Int5/Int6 GPTQ + Brotli byte-shuffle
techniques: SP8192 tokenizer (higher bytes-per-token headroom vs lower vocab variants)
Depth recurrence: blocks 4-6 repeated a second time (3-layer recurrence)
Parallel residuals: attention and MLP run in parallel from same input (PaLM-style)
MuonEq-R: row-norm equalization before Newton-Schulz5 orthogonalization
XSA-all: all blocks share K,V from block 0
Self-generated calibration activations for Hessian-proxy GPTQ
Mixed Int5/Int6 GPTQ: least-sensitive MLP layers selected for Int5 via Hessian-proxy ranking
Brotli-11 + byte-shuffle compression for quantized weights
SWA over late-training checkpoints (default start_frac=0.5, every=50)
Coprime-stride shard loader for better document diversity
Score-first causal TTT on last 3 blocks (legal)
Higher weight decay 0.085 (Kevin Clark's high-WD config)
